description: Always-loaded policy for the shared knowledge base: retrieve relevant canonical knowledge with the `npx @quanvo99/ai-rules@latest kb search` command before non-trivial work and cite it, capture worthwhile non-trivial knowledge afterward with the matching `npx @quanvo99/ai-rules@latest kb capture` command (question/til/blueprint), use `npx @quanvo99/ai-rules@latest kb capture memory` sparingly for tiny always-true project facts, and treat every capture as a draft pending human review rather than canonical knowledge

files.description: Concise always-loaded rule: retrieve-first via `npx @quanvo99/ai-rules@latest kb search` and cite, capture-when-worthwhile via `npx @quanvo99/ai-rules@latest kb capture question/til/blueprint`, memory sparingly for always-true facts, drafts are not canonical
